allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem F:\\ -Directory | Select-Object Name; "---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\projects","$env:USERPROFILE\\source","D:\\projects" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($roots = @\("F:\\BankerOS", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents"\); foreach \($r in $roots\) { if \(Test-Path $r\) { Get-ChildItem $r -Filter "start_all.bat" -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName } })
